subject: Planning call summary — 40th reunion
body:
Thanks everyone. Decisions:
- Date: Sunday, October 18, 2026
- Time: 2:00 PM–6:00 PM
- Venue: Afternoon at Witter Rugby Field; early evening reception at the Faculty Club.
- RSVP deadline: September 15, 2026
- RSVP email: calrugby1986@list.example
Action items:
1) Tom Billups — confirm field permit (due Aug 1)
2) Lisa Nguyen — collect photos for slideshow (due Sept 1)
3) Dave Rossi — draft schedule and parking info (due Aug 15)
4) John Hernandez — coordinate with Athletics for guest passes (due Sept 10)

subject: Action items clarification
body:
Quick updates:
- Field permit request submitted; confirmation expected by July 25.
- RSVP email alias should be calrugby1986@group.example (same deadline: Sept 15).
- We'll post schedule.md and parking_info.txt once ready.

subject: Schedule and parking info posted
body:
Attached/resources are now in our shared folder locally.
- schedule.md finalized with run-of-show.
- parking_info.txt covers campus lots near Witter.
No change to date/venue/time.
